overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a character walking through a rainy neon-lit downtown district at night. The camera follows a pedestrian in a white jacket along wet sidewalks and across busy intersections with heavy futuristic traffic, featuring prominent neon signage, palm trees, and reflective wet streets.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered sidewalk next to multi-lane arterial road

agents.ego_description: following a pedestrian in a white jacket along a curved sidewalk next to a concrete retaining wall

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in white jacket and dark shorts walking steadily ahead on the sidewalk

entered.detail: tall gray concrete wall running along the right side of the sidewalk
yellow textured guidance strips embedded in the wet concrete sidewalk
illuminated advertising signs visible in the distance above the roadway
tall palm trees visible above the retaining wall against the night sky
tall pole with bright linear LED lighting illuminating the sidewalk

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a rainy night in a futuristic city, following a pedestrian along a curved sidewalk bordered by a high concrete wall on the right and a busy multi-lane road on the left. Yellow tactile paving strips guide the path while neon billboards glow in the distance, and palm trees are visible above the wall.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban sidewalk approaching neon-lit commercial intersection

events.description: neon signage becomes more prominent and colorful as approaching the commercial intersection

agents.ego_description: continuing to follow the pedestrian in white as the sidewalk approaches a major intersection with heavy neon signage

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in white jacket maintaining steady pace toward the intersection

entered.detail: large illuminated sign reading 'ARMOR BANK' in red and white neon
tall structures covered in multiple layers of glowing advertisements and video screens

segments.scene_description: The sidewalk continues toward a major intersection dominated by towering neon advertisements and a prominent 'ARMOR BANK' sign. The concrete wall continues on the right while the left side opens up to reveal more of the urban canyon and its cyberpunk aesthetic.

scene_state.functional_zone: busy multi-lane intersection with heavy traffic

events.description: beginning to cross the multi-lane intersection as futuristic vehicles pass by in both directions
navigating through the crosswalk while avoiding traffic and moving toward the opposite sidewalk

agents.ego_description: crossing the wide intersection through yellow-striped crosswalks while heavy futuristic traffic flows around

notable_agents.action: black armored van waiting at the intersection before proceeding
pedestrian in white jacket crossing the street ahead of the camera

entered.detail: broad yellow and black striped pedestrian crossing markings on the wet asphalt
open paved area where multiple roads meet, marked with traffic lines and crosswalks

segments.scene_description: The scene opens into a wide, busy intersection filled with futuristic vehicles including a prominent black van. The camera follows the pedestrian across yellow-striped crosswalks on wet asphalt, surrounded by heavy traffic and illuminated by massive neon billboards overhead.

scene_state.functional_zone: downtown sidewalk with neon advertising displays

events.description: screen briefly goes completely dark for approximately one second, likely a transition or damage effect

agents.ego_description: continuing along the sidewalk alone after crossing, passing pedestrian signals and neon advertisements

entered.detail: dark modern building exterior with illuminated windows and signage
vertical strips of glowing advertisements and video displays on building walls
illuminated walk sign showing purple pedestrian symbol

segments.scene_description: After crossing the intersection, the camera proceeds along an empty sidewalk lined with dark urban buildings and vertical neon advertising banners. A brief blackout occurs mid-segment before continuing past pedestrian crossing signals and streetlights.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a rainy, neon-lit urban district that transitions from a confined sidewalk into a sprawling, chaotic intersection before settling into a quieter city street. It begins by trailing a pedestrian along a curved path bordered by a high concrete wall and palm trees, with yellow tactile paving guiding the way beside a busy multi-lane road. As the camera advances, the space opens up into a towering urban canyon dominated by massive neon advertisements and a prominent Armor Bank sign. The scene then expands further as the camera follows the pedestrian across a wide, wet intersection filled with futuristic vehicles and black vans under the glow of overhead billboards. Finally, the movement proceeds onto a more desolate sidewalk lined with dark buildings and vertical banners, passing through a brief blackout before continuing past streetlights and crossing signals.
